meaning: n.一口vt.吸,进晚餐,体验vi.吃晚饭,啜饮
examples: Thank ye kindly, ma'am, I could sup up another mug of it.
Many fans want to sup with Mr Jones, despite the fact that he once exploded after eating a wafer-thin mint.
He had been invited to sup with a colleague and his wife.
This lets the devices access servers via one of three ways: SUP, SAP Gateway, and Netweaver.
Det Sup Richard Baker said the investigation was "very much ongoing" despite officers concluding their latest searches.
